notes: tdarr-style accept flow: with auto-accept OFF, completed jobs hold their output for review and 'Accept' swaps the new file in (original replaced); auto-accept ON replaces immediately. Active jobs now show a node tag so you can see which GPU runs each job. Media-drive guard: a node whose Z: drive is hung/unmapped refuses to claim jobs and says why (ends the 'stuck at Starting' black-hole). Plus v2.23 live worker scaling + temp auto-spill.
